arts.ttl: Daniel Farke confirms Leeds United ace future is unresolved, he’s now vulnerable to a transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is out of contract in the summer, but is no closer to sitting down with the club to discuss an extension, according to Daniel Farke. Leeds v Norwich: Daniel Farke delivers Junior Firpo team news update

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds United favourite at centre of four-way transfer battle as Premier League clubs circle
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Former Leeds United midfielder Glen Kamara could be on the move in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Emi Buendia meets two of Daniel Farke’s Leeds January transfer criteria
arts.sum: But muscle memory always remains present and Farke remains an admirer, admitting he has seen Unai Emery’s comments that Buendia might be allowed to leave Villa Park on loan this month. “Obviously I've worked with Emi Buendia in former years, he was one of my best players, I really rate him but I don't comment on the situation of a player right now playing for a different side.”

arts.ttl: Powers of Daniel Farke influence set to be tested as Leeds United face transfer competition
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke was unwilling to commit any real insight to Emi Buendia transfer speculation after Sunday’s win, but did acknowledge the Argentine’s brilliance having worked with him at Norwich City. It’s common knowledge that Leeds tried to sign Aston Villa attacking midfielder in the summer, and missed out as he opted to stay in the Premier League, and it doesn’t need saying that a player of his quality would be an ideal signing for Leeds this month too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United recruitment team statement made as title contenders issue transfer update on duo
arts.sum: "It makes sense for young players the experience to grow and have game time. Asked about whether Debayo could leave on loan before deadline day, Farke told reporters at Thorp Arch: "It's important we are not over doing it [sending players out on loan].

arts.ttl: ‘Begin to worry’ – Leeds United vs Norwich City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Leeds United vs Norwich City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Wednesday. The post ‘Begin to worry’ – Leeds United vs Norwich City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI vs Norwich as Gnonto and Ramazani start
arts.sum: Daniel Farke could make a number of changes for Leeds United's home clash with Norwich City tomorrow night with one eye on Monday’s important trip to Burnley. Predicted Leeds United XI : Meslier; Bogle, Ampadu, Rodon, Byram; Tanaka, Rothwell; James, Gnonto, Ramazani; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Emi Buendia to Leeds United transfer latest: Emery 'permission', Farke response, dream move
arts.sum: Daniel Farke's former player Emiliano Buendia could soon leave Aston Villa due to a lack of game time. Asked if Villa wouldn't stand in his way if he wanted to depart, Emery replied: "Of course, playing more minutes, he can feel better."
